source_pr.title: *: reference the CONTRIBUTING.md in the community repo
source_pr.body:
# What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Before this PR, there are many places to describe how to contribute to the tidb project. It's hard to keep all the documents with the same content.

### What is changed and how it works?

maintain the document which describes how to contribute in the community repo, reference that document in other places.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - No code

symptoms: -- Making code more resilient (sleeps, backoffs, reducing flakiness, etc).
failure_signature: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Documentation-only change; no concrete flaky failure signature provided.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is a documentation change that references a centralized CONTRIBUTING guide. It does not include a targeted stabilization change tied to a known intermittent failure signature, so keep it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: -- Making code more resilient (sleeps, backoffs, reducing flakiness, etc).
